title: ballimon maritimum
intro: Ballimon maritimum, also known as Sea Holly, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in coastal areas, featuring prickly stems and blue or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Ballimon maritimum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Ballimon maritimum preparations include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for herbal use.
